title: schoenus dregeanus
intro: Schoenus dregeanus, also known as Drege's spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Schoenus dregeanus is prepared by making a tea from the roots and leaves, or by using the plant in a decoction or infusion for various health conditions.
